# Fireworks AI Python SDK

This repository contains two separate codebases:

1. **Fireworks REST API SDK** (auto-generated by Stainless) — everything outside of `src/fireworks/training/`.
2. **Tinker-style Training SDK** — located entirely in `src/fireworks/training/`.

## Important: Training SDK scope

When working on the Tinker-style training SDK (GRPO, DPO, SFT, RL training),
**only look at code in `src/fireworks/training/`**. All other code in this
repository is auto-generated and should not be referenced or modified for
training-related work.

Training SDK documentation: `src/fireworks/training/README.md`
